name: CZ75自动型 | 短趾雕
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. A bird of prey carrying a snake has been custom painted on this CZ75. A snake eater, minus the catchy theme song
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 这把CZ75采用了自定义涂装，绘有一只捕食的短趾雕正擒住了一条蛇。 一名特种兵，就是少了点脍炙人口的主旋律
